song_name: A-Ha - Take On Me - Journey - Dont Stop Believin - The Pretenders - Ill Stand By You
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                 [ch]E[/ch]
We're talking away[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]A[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]
Well I dont know what I'm to say[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bm[/ch]            [ch]E[/ch]
Ill say it anyway……[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]
Just a small town[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Bm[/ch]
girl, living in a[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
lonely world[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
She took the midnight train…….[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F#m[/ch]
And when the night[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Bm[/ch]
falls on you[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]                [ch]Bm[/ch]
Don't know what to do[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]G[/ch]
Nothing you confess[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]A[/ch]
Could make me love you less……[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]D[/ch]
So I better shape up, cause you[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]        [ch]Bm[/ch]
need a man    (I need a man[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]G[/ch]
who can keep me satisfied)[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]D[/ch]
I better shape up……[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]                 [ch]E[/ch]
Cuz when you call my name[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]D[/ch]
It's like a little prayer[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]A[/ch]
I'm down on my knees[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F#m[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
I wanna take you there……[/tab]

To the final count-
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
Doooowwn[/tab]


[Outro]
[ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Bm[/ch]

[ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]   [ch]F#m[/ch]

[ch]E[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]

[ch]C#[/ch]
